creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 213379
patch

Hi Guido,

The attached patch changes MASTER_SITES to GitHub because the new release 2.10 doesn't exist in MASTER_SITES.

I am also proposing to enable options VIDEO and WEBRTC by default. The reason is that these two are common use areas, and are required to support WebRTC, which is a major use case for the pjsip libary.

The patch also a typo fix.


Thank you,
Yuri
